name: Kinde Authentication & User Management API
what_it_does: Modern authentication and user management platform with Management API for user operations, feature flags, organizations, and permissions — built for B2B SaaS teams needing multi-tenant auth with SSO, MFA, and clean developer experience.
use_cases: Managing users, organizations, and permissions programmatically via Management API
Implementing OAuth2/OIDC authentication without building auth infrastructure
Feature flag management for B2B SaaS with organization-level targeting
Multi-tenant organization management with SSO per-organization
User onboarding automation that creates accounts and sets initial permissions
not_for: Consumer auth at massive scale without B2B organization needs (use Auth0 or Cognito)
Pure CIAM without developer-first design philosophy
best_when: A B2B SaaS team needs modern multi-tenant authentication with organization management, feature flags, and excellent developer experience without Auth0 pricing shock.
avoid_when: You need consumer-scale identity management, complex enterprise identity governance, or on-premise deployment.

auth.notes: OAuth2 M2M (machine-to-machine) token for Management API. Client credentials flow. Scoped access per resource type. User tokens for authentication SDK. Management API separate from auth SDK.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 10,500 MAU, unlimited organizations, all features
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro from $25/month for 10,500+ MAU; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Very generous free tier — 10,500 MAU is substantial for early products. Feature-complete free tier including SSO and MFA. Growing rapidly as Auth0 alternative. Australian company.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; Management API has standard rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Comprehensive Management API for users, organizations, roles, and permissions. OAuth2 M2M for agent authentication. Multiple language SDKs. Webhook support for user and organization events. Good documentation with examples.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User creation via invite — idempotent for same email. Organization management operations are idempotent. Permission assignments idempotent. User updates idempotent for same values.
known_agent_gotchas: M2M token for Management API expires — must refresh periodically (1 hour default)
Organization-scoped operations require organization ID context
Feature flags are Kinde-specific — separate from generic flag platforms
SSO setup per organization requires UI configuration — not fully API-driven

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 M2M with scoped tokens. SOC2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant. US, EU, and AU data residency. Token expiry limits credential exposure window. Open-source SDKs for auditability.
